nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

en.lifeSummary: Margaret was born in 1389, in Great Moulton, Norfolk, England. She married John Moulton in 1409, in Great Moulton, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died after 1415, in Ormesby Saint Margaret, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaretは1389年にイギリスノーフォルクグレアト モウルトンで生まれた。1409年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクグレアト モウルトンでJohn Moultonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1415年以後にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクオルメスビー サイント マーガレットで死去した。

ko.Ormesby Saint Margaret, Great Yarmouth,: 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 오메스비 세인트 마거릿
ko.lifeSummary: Margaret(은)는 1389년 영국 노르폴크 그리트 모우턴에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1409년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 그리트 모우턴에서 John Moulton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1415년 이후 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 오메스비 세인트 마거릿에서 사망했다.

ru.Ormesby Saint Margaret, Great Yarmouth,: ормесби сеинт маргарет, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Margaret родилась в 1389 г. в местности грит моултон, норфолк, Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Moulton в 1409 г. в местности грит моултон, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла после 1415 г. в местности ормесби сеинт маргарет, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания.
